scripts.build: pnpm --filter screeps-connectivity build && pnpm --filter screeps-client build
scripts.build:mod: pnpm --filter screeps-connectivity build && pnpm --filter screeps-mod-client build
scripts.build:release: pnpm --filter screeps-connectivity build && pnpm --filter screeps-client build && pnpm --filter screepsmod-client-new build && pnpm --filter xxscreeps-mod-client build
